raw_output:
PR #4 correctness review (Claude, Fable 5, independent fresh-context pass, head 88aee5f).

Verification performed by the leg: pytest 58 passed with 100% branch coverage (0 missed, 0 partial); ruff check/format and mypy strict clean; scripts/review_gate.py changes proven formatting-only by AST comparison against main (byte-identical ast.dump); all four action SHA pins resolved to their claimed tags via the GitHub API; every pin/cooldown claim in requirements-dev.txt verified against PyPI upload times, including confirming ruff 0.15.22 (6 days old) was correctly skipped; live CI run 29885540485 checked non-vacuous (lychee 6/6 links, gitleaks scanned the PR range, pip-audit resolved the full closure with no known vulnerabilities); fake_run monkeypatch in test_diff_failure_diagnostic verified sound (merge-base delegates to real run; diff branch genuinely exercised); wave-plan touch-set matches the diff file-for-file.

Findings: F1 (P3) ci.yml comment claimed gitleaks scans "all commits" but the action scans only the PR/push range (confirmed in the run log: detect base^..head, 2 commits scanned); fetch-depth 0 still needed. F2 (P3) fail_under=95 contradicts the "just under the measured value" comment and wave-plan rule when measured is 100. F3 (nit) links job silently depends on lychee-action's implicit token default; token: "" would break private-repo github.com links with no hint in the file. F4 (nit) wave-plan prose described --offline lychee and a --cov-fail-under CLI flag; shipped mechanism is one online pass with retries and the floor in pyproject. F5 (nit) mypy strict does not type test-to-gate call sites (importlib load types review_gate as ModuleType/Any); the enforcement claim should carry a scope note.

Overall: clean, well-executed lane; every mechanical claim checked against ground truth held; findings are documentation-versus-behavior drift; nothing blocking, no P1/P2.

--- Post-review delta note (orchestrator, attested at final head 7950a47) ---
Single-round battery on 88aee5f converged (zero blocking findings across all
four legs). The validated non-blocking findings were then fixed and committed
as 7950a47: GITLEAKS_VERSION/lycheeVersion pinned in-diff, gitleaks range-scan
comment corrected, coverage floor 95->99 to match its rationale (measured
100%), lychee implicit-token and mypy-scope notes added, pip-audit cooldown
comment, wave-plan prose matched to shipped mechanisms, threat-model impact
rewritten to record the checksum-unverified scanner downloads and floating
transitives as accepted dev-scoped residuals (no path to skill consumers -
enforcement runs through the stdlib-only gate job, ruleset, and human
escalation on workflow changes). Local verification on the fixed head:
58 tests pass, 100% branch coverage (floor 99 enforced), ruff check/format
clean, mypy strict clean, workflow YAML parses, git diff --check clean.
The attested hash covers the fixed state. This PR touches
.github/workflows/ci.yml and therefore escalates to Kristov for merge
regardless of battery outcome.

findings.summary: gitleaks comment claimed full-history scanning; action scans PR/push range only
findings.reason: Comment corrected to range-scan + shallow-clone rationale.

findings.summary: Coverage floor 95 contradicts 'just under measured' rationale (measured 100)
findings.reason: fail_under raised to 99; comment states the measured value.

findings.summary: links job silently depends on lychee-action's implicit default token
findings.reason: Dependence documented in the workflow with a do-not-blank warning.

findings.summary: Wave-plan prose described --offline lychee and a CLI coverage flag; different mechanisms shipped
findings.reason: Plan prose matched to the shipped mechanisms.

findings.summary: mypy strict does not type test-to-gate call sites (importlib load = Any)
findings.reason: Scope note added to [tool.mypy]; scripts/ fully covered.
